purpose: Provide a negative suite fixture whose checked child report lacks direct evidence entries.

routing.conflict_resolution: Use the fixture-local member report and keep the missing evidence entries as the isolated defect.

shared_evidence_rules: Checked children require direct member report evidence.
Progress ledgers, runtime ids, and PM text cannot satisfy suite closure.

current_notes: The suite map and suite contract schema shapes are valid.
The member report intentionally has an empty evidence list.

validation_layers: Suite member path and evidence checks through local check-suite command.
Child closure rollup must reject reports without direct evidence entries.
maintenance_ownership: Refresh this fixture after child closure evidence semantics change.
residual_risk: This suite contract covers only the missing-direct-evidence negative branch.
claim_boundary: This suite contract covers only the bad_suite_child_without_closure negative fixture records, member path, and fixture-local member report. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
